description.en: Profile your company monorepo, apply justified frontend caching (lazy loading, useMemo) and FastAPI endpoint caching with TTL and invalidation, and document freshness vs. performance tradeoffs in CACHING_REPORT.md.
description.es: Perfiliza tu monorepo, aplica caching justificado en frontend (lazy loading, useMemo) y en endpoints FastAPI con TTL e invalidación, y documenta los intercambios frescura vs. rendimiento en CACHING_REPORT.md.
